{{Infobox character
| name = Kelthryss
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|snarls, spits sparks}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Threshold: Stories from Cradle (novel)|Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
}}

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Kelthryss is a northern ivory feathered drake and a [[dragon]]-turtle who serves as a companion to [[Carmine]]. She is a formidable combatant capable of spitting sparks and engaging in battle alongside others. As a survivor of a monster attack that was subsequently concealed by [[Eternity]], she maintains a protective bond with [[Carmine]], often shielding him with her wings and tail. Kelthryss is described as being eager to fight and highly responsive to her owner's needs.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Kelthryss is a northern ivory feathered drake that serves as a protector for [[Carmine]]. While traveling alongside both [[Ziel]] and [[Carmine]], this creature is known to snarl and spit sparks. As a feathered drake of the north, Kelthryss remains a constant companion to its traveling party.}}

<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">5</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kelthryss]] is a northern ivory feathered drake.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kelthryss]] is a northern ivory feathered drake that protects [[Carmine]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kelthryss]] is a feathered drake.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kelthryss]] is a drake that snarls and spits sparks.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Kelthryss]] is a character traveling with [[Ziel]] and [[Carmine]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
